_structure: Manifest chunk. Contains project overview, core loop, and key constraints. Detailed design for each framework lives in sub-chunks: gamestate, breeding, campaign, technical.

project_summary.title: Children of Battle
project_summary.tagline: Mobile tactical roguelike with generational breeding, deck-building combat, and permadeath
project_summary.core_inspiration: Final Fantasy Tactics + Fire Emblem + Mewgenics + Knights of Ages

sequence: 1. Campaign: 3-6 tactical battles + events (2-4 per campaign)
2. Character age post-campaign; permadeath mechanic active (2 revives max, unless skill triggers)
3. Events: encounter potential mates, unlock resources, unlock temporary training options
4. Breeding: produce full children (resource cost) or cheap children (free)
5. Growing-up: character ages through training phase with teacher, then becomes adult
6. Equipment: decay over campaigns, requires repair (resource cost)
7. Rest/Skip: optional loop exit—age characters without combat, zero income, zero tactical risk

key_constraints.permadeath: Up to 2 revives per campaign. If revive skill (phoenix blood, undead form) triggers first, revive consumed by skill, not revive pool.
key_constraints.character_lifespan: Characters age each campaign or rest cycle. Retirement after max age, then death.
key_constraints.training_scarcity: Limited training window per character lifespan. Teachers = trained characters appointed to children. Knowledge must be passed generationally.
key_constraints.resources: Gold (from campaigns), breeding partners (from events), training window (character lifespan). Gold gates breeding and equipment repair.
childrearing_modes: Full: resource cost, child inherits all gene-based cards from parents, unlocks all training-based cards
Cheap: free, child inherits reduced gene-based cards, training unlocks fewer cards. Cheap children provide roster depth without extinction risk.
key_constraints.roster_population: Max 4 characters per campaign. Cheap children free allows sustainable population despite permadeath.

sub_chunks.gamestate: complete data model by scope (global, run, character, combat)
sub_chunks.breeding: gene inheritance model, full-vs-cheap mechanics, mate compatibility
sub_chunks.campaign: difficulty scaling, battle structure, event types, reward tables
sub_chunks.technical: mobile architecture, save system, roguelike run structure, deck mechanics

open_questions: Gene inheritance: both parents blend? One dominant? Random draw?
Cheap vs. full: gene count reduction or gene potency reduction?
Max retirement age: should it scale with difficulty or remain fixed?

session_log.2026-05-04: Initial design session. Core loop locked. Four framework areas identified. Gamestate architecture detailed. Breeding and campaign structure pending.
